code: import axios from'axios';import{getErrorMessage}from'./errors';import{assertActiveSession,handleUnauthorized,isAuthBootstrapInProgress}from'./authSession';import{getStoredToken}from'./tokenStorage';const api=axios.create({baseURL:'/api',timeout:120000,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});function isLoginRequest(){let url=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'';return String(url).includes('/auth/login');}api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{if(!isLoginRequest(config.url)){try{assertActiveSession();}catch(err){return Promise.reject(err);}}const token=getStoredToken();if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});api.interceptors.response.use(response=>response,error=>{var _error$response,_error$config;error.normalizedMessage=getErrorMessage(error);const status=(_error$response=error.response)===null||_error$response===void 0?void 0:_error$response.status;const url=((_error$config=error.config)===null||_error$config===void 0?void 0:_error$config.url)||'';if(status===401&&!isLoginRequest(url)&&!isAuthBootstrapInProgress()){handleUnauthorized('api_401');}return Promise.reject(error);});export default api;
